allow: PowerShell($ghPath = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; $alt = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; @\($ghPath, $alt\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { "FOUND: $_"; & $_ --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1 } }; "---"; Get-Process winget,msiexec -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Id -AutoSize)

PowerShell($tok = "8536817944:AAHOBElF1cSL1lODb3ONBwgpKDB-QO5xzO4"; $chat = "8917894706"; $body = @{ chat_id = $chat; parse_mode = "HTML"; text = "🟢 Pre-flight check passed.`n`nartsbycreeda.com is live with the new /order flow.`nEnv vars: ✅ Postgres ✅ Paystack ✅ Admin`nReady for your test purchase." } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.telegram.org/bot$tok/sendMessage" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 15; if \($r.ok\) { "✓ Test message delivered to your Telegram" } } catch { "Telegram error: $_" })
